# Free AP Practice

> Free AP practice for high school students: plan which APs to take, preview Unit 1 over the summer, and generate unlimited practice questions with instant feedback. No signup required.

Use this site to choose AP classes wisely, build a summer study habit (about 15–30 minutes a day), and prepare for AP exams. Select an AP subject, choose a unit or custom topic, and generate practice questions with explanations.

## Features

- AI question generation across 20+ AP subjects
- AP course planning and summer study guides
- Instant feedback with detailed explanations
- Progress tracking and streak counting
- Custom topic and unit selection
- Privacy-first: progress is saved locally for anonymous use and can be stored to your account when signed in
- 100% free, no ads or subscriptions

## Supported AP Subjects

- Sciences: Biology, Chemistry, Physics 1, Physics 2, Physics C: Mechanics, Physics C: E&M, Environmental Science
- Mathematics: Calculus AB, Calculus BC, Statistics, Precalculus
- Computer Science: Computer Science A, Computer Science Principles
- English: English Language, English Literature
- History: AP US History, AP World History, AP European History
- Social Sciences: Psychology, Human Geography, Government and Politics
- Economics: Microeconomics, Macroeconomics

## Reference Sheets

- [AP Biology Equations and Formulas Sheet](/ap-biology-equations-and-formulas-sheet.pdf): Essential formulas for AP Biology exam
- [AP Chemistry Equations Sheet](/ap-chemistry-equations-sheet.pdf): Key equations for AP Chemistry
- [AP Physics 1 Equations Sheet](/ap-physics-1-equations-sheet.pdf): Physics 1 reference formulas
- [AP Physics 2 Equations Sheet](/ap-physics-2-equations-sheet.pdf): Physics 2 reference formulas
- [AP Physics C: Mechanics Equations Sheet](/ap-physics-c-mechanics-equations-sheet.pdf): Calculus-based mechanics
- [AP Physics C: Electricity and Magnetism Equations Sheet](/ap-physics-c-electricity-and-magnetism-equations-sheet.pdf): E&M reference
- [AP Environmental Science Exam Reference Sheet](/ap-environmental-science-exam-reference-sheet.pdf): Environmental science formulas
- [AP Statistics Formula Tables Sheet](/ap-statistics-formula-tables-sheet.pdf): Statistics formulas
- [AP Computer Science A: Java Quick Reference](/ap-computer-science-a-java-quick-reference.pdf): Java syntax reference
- [AP Computer Science Principles Exam Reference Sheet](/ap-computer-science-principles-exam-reference-sheet.pdf): CSP reference

## Pages

- [Home](https://freeappractice.org/): Main question generator
- [Summer AP Study Guide](https://freeappractice.org/summer): Plan APs and preview Unit 1 over the summer
- [About](https://freeappractice.org/about): Mission and approach
- [Blog](https://freeappractice.org/blog): Course planning, summer study, and exam prep guides
- [Stats](https://freeappractice.org/stats): Usage statistics
- [Changelog](https://freeappractice.org/changelog): Feature updates

## Start Here (Blog)

- [Which APs Should You Take?](https://freeappractice.org/blog/which-aps-to-take): Course planning after exam season and for next year
- [Summer AP Study Plan](https://freeappractice.org/blog/summer-ap-study-plan): Realistic 4-week Unit 1 preview schedule
